checks.summary: Alpha expansion now has a source-controlled gate manifest that ties content validation, physics replay, source provenance, and end-to-end river runs together.
The gate names alpha content coverage, river selection, systems progression, crew conversation, and network gate contracts as content-validation evidence.
The gate requires accepted Milestone 20 report-lock/live-water smoke evidence, round-trip validation, analytic guardrails, and replayable physics evidence before playable promotion.
The gate requires South Fork, Colorado, Pacuare, and source-catalog provenance, including CRS, transform, flow-band, license/terms, rights, and guide-review metadata.
The gate requires selection-to-launch-to-completion/failure-to-restart-to-scoring-to-replay-review evidence for every playable alpha river section.
Colorado and Pacuare remain planning-only until their placeholder source, hydrology, guide-review, geospatial, protected-area, and field-media blockers are replaced with reviewed evidence.

notes: This report closes the Milestone 24 source-controlled gate contract, not the future playable alpha promotion itself.
If any source manifest, content catalog, validation report, live-water bridge, river selection entry, or route target changes, regenerate this gate report.
Playable expansion still needs automation execution, physics replay, provenance checks, and end-to-end captures for the specific river sections being promoted.
